vita: As a Vel'Ar born into the bustling trade hub of Zyphus Prime, I have navigated through countless star systems to become an influential trader. My family lineage is steeped in commerce and negotin', with ancestors who forged alliances that shaped interstellar politics.
portrait_prompt: A tall Vel'Ar standing at the helm of a sleek trade vessel, its hull adorned with symbols from across known space. The transparent background reveals bustling markets and star maps through which I gaze outwardly as if looking into an endless sea of opportunity.
